title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six Claude skills for project productivity: web scraping for data discovery, knowledge base ingestion, system improvement iteration, multi-perspective feedback, testing before deployment, and compound engineering for shipping. The workflow is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project.
